summary: Iteration 112: Frontend UI Testing for Honorary FA Licensee Simulation - 5/6 tests PASSED. All simulation features work correctly: Honorary FA option exists in dropdown, sidebar correctly hides Habits/Affiliate during licensee simulation, Family Accounts page loads with Maria Miles data, detail view with projections table works, Withdrawals tab works. One observation: Habits/Affiliate ARE visible for admin when NOT simulating (may be by design based on code).

minor.issue: Returns 403 during admin simulation - expected behavior but shows in console

issues: Console warnings about DialogContent missing DialogTitle for accessibility - minor a11y issue

action_items: CLARIFICATION NEEDED: Test 6 shows Daily Habits and Affiliate Center ARE visible in admin sidebar when NOT simulating. The requirement says they should NOT show, but the Sidebar.jsx code (line 189-191) intentionally includes them in 'alwaysInclude' for non-licensees. Need clarification if this is the intended behavior or a bug.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Sidebar.jsx correctly filters nav items based on isLicenseeView and isHonoraryFa flags
✅ hideForLicensee flag properly hides Trade Monitor, Daily Habits, Affiliate Center for licensees
✅ honoraryFaOnly flag properly shows Family Accounts only for honorary_fa licensees
✅ licenseeOnly flag properly shows Deposit/Withdrawal only for licensees
✅ FamilyAccountsPage.jsx correctly handles admin simulation with isAdminSimulation check
✅ MemberDetailView correctly displays projections table with all required columns
⚠️ Line 189-191: alwaysInclude adds habits/affiliate for non-licensees - may conflict with requirement
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Honorary FA licensee simulation features working. During simulation: sidebar shows only Dashboard, Profit Tracker, Deposit/Withdrawal, Family Accounts. Family Accounts page shows family members with account values and profits. Maria Miles detail view shows projections table. When admin NOT simulating: sidebar shows Daily Habits and Affiliate Center (may need clarification if intended).

test_1_honorary_fa_option.description: Honorary FA (Family) View option exists in Simulate View dropdown

test_2_sidebar_during_simulation.description: Sidebar shows ONLY: Dashboard, Profit Tracker, Deposit/Withdrawal, Family Accounts. NO Daily Habits, NO Affiliate Center, NO Trade Monitor

test_3_family_accounts_page.description: Family Accounts page loads during simulation, shows Maria Miles (spouse) with Account Value $2,489.60, Profit $489.56, Growth 24.5%

test_4_maria_detail_view.description: Maria Miles detail view shows: Account Value $2,489.60, Total Profit $489.60, Starting Amount $2,000.00, Month Profit $336.60. Projections table shows Date, Balance Before, Manager Traded, LOT Size, Daily Profit (+$30.60), Balance After

test_5_withdrawals_tab.description: Withdrawals tab works, shows 'No withdrawal requests yet' message

test_6_admin_sidebar_no_simulation.description: Daily Habits and Affiliate Center ARE visible in admin sidebar when NOT simulating. Requirement says they should NOT show, but Sidebar.jsx code (line 189-191) includes them in alwaysInclude. May be intended behavior - needs clarification.
